description: Style notearrow is known for its no nonsense, classic casual wear for men. This easy to wear, eternally in vogue pair balances casual and experimental modernism perfectly. Wear this with casual shirts and shoes.Product DetailsWhite flat front trousers with two pockets on the sides, two buttoned pockets on the back, button and zipped closure, belt loops at the waistband, brand badge above the right pocket at the back and extended hemsMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
